scenarios.title: [Sign in] Judge signs in with a valid PIN
[Device binding] The same PIN cannot be used on two devices at the same time
Create a competition with basic information
Configure the jury size in official mode
Add athletes with club and group information
[Defaults] Default language is French
[Switching] User switches to English and it applies to the whole UI
[Persistence] Language choice is persisted after refresh
[Fallback] Unsupported language falls back to French
[Authorization] Deactivated judge cannot submit a score
[Authorization] Active judge can submit a score
[Admin] Referee activates a judge
[Admin] Activating an already active judge does not change state
[Admin] Deactivating an already deactivated judge does not change state
Accuracy starts at 4.0 and applies deductions and corrections
Presentation is entered as three sub-scores on 2.0 each
Send prevents accidental double submit
Public page is accessible without authentication
Public page does not allow score editing
[Installability] Application is installable
[Offline] Service worker is available for offline mode
[Offline] Home page loads from cache when offline after first visit
[Offline] Core assets are available offline
[Realtime] Judge submission appears on admin feed
[Realtime] Deactivated judge cannot submit and admin receives no score event
Scoreboard shows an athlete row with judge totals and final score
Final score is recalculated whenever a judge score arrives
[Deductions] Major mistake deduction
[Deductions] Minor mistake deduction
[Deductions] Multiple deductions are cumulative
[Bounds] Score floors at zero on major deduction
[Bounds] Score floors at zero on minor deduction
[Input] Start score accepts comma decimal separator
Final score discards the highest and lowest for a 5-judge jury
Final score discards the highest and lowest for a 7-judge jury
Final round averages two performances
Tie-break uses presentation score first, then the sum of all judges points
[Queueing] Score is queued when sending without network
[Queueing] Score is sent immediately when network is available
[Queueing] Double tap does not queue duplicates
[Queueing] Queued scores persist after refresh
[Sync] Queued scores are synced when the network comes back
[Sync] Partial sync keeps failed items queued
[Sign in] Judge cannot sign in with an inactive PIN
[Sign in] Judge cannot sign in with a non-numeric PIN
[Sign in] Judge cannot sign in with a PIN of the wrong length
[Rate limiting] Too many invalid attempts temporarily blocks the PIN
[Rate limiting] A successful sign-in resets the invalid attempt counter
[Device binding] The same PIN cannot be used on two devices at the same time
[Sessions] A referee can revoke a judge session
[Roles] Admin generates a referee PIN, referee generates judge PINs
Presentation inputs clamp to bounds
Spectator entry point exists from the home page
Spectator can open the game using the current competition id
Login page is accessible from the home page
[UI] Login page role buttons show the right form
[UI] Admin page redirects to login when not authenticated
[UI] Admin can generate a referee PIN from the UI
[UI] Referee can generate judge PINs from the UI
[UI] Referee page redirects to login when not authenticated
[UI] Referee can sign out and loses access to referee page
[UI] Judge page redirects to login when not authenticated
Spectator can open the public results from the spectator game
Judge area is protected when accessed from spectator game
[UI] Admin can sign out and loses access to admin page
[Persistence] Language choice is applied on the login page
